summary: Comprehensive testing of 444.HEIMAT-FUNK Music platform Phase 1. Backend: 23/26 tests passed (88%), 2 skipped (no songs for like/playlist tests), 1 failed (brute force timing). Frontend: All pages working correctly with German UI, dark navy/gold theme, responsive design.

minor.issue: Brute force lockout triggers after 6 failed attempts instead of 5 (check happens before increment)

action_items: Minor: Fix brute force protection to lock after exactly 5 failed attempts (currently locks after 6)
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper async/await usage, Pydantic models, JWT auth with httpOnly cookies
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
CORS properly configured with credentials support
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 complete. All auth endpoints working (register, login, logout, me, refresh). Songs CRUD working including upload with metadata extraction. Playlists CRUD working. Search, stats, artists endpoints working. Profile update working. UI fully functional with German language, dark navy/gold theme, responsive design. Mobile bottom navigation working. The only minor issue is brute force protection triggers after 6 attempts instead of 5.

auth.register: PASS - Creates user with username, email, password
auth.login: PASS - Returns user + sets httpOnly cookies
auth.me: PASS - Returns current user with valid cookie
auth.brute_force: PARTIAL - Locks after 6 attempts instead of 5

songs.upload: PASS - Multipart form-data upload with metadata

frontend.dashboard: PASS - Shows greeting with username, stats cards
frontend.sidebar: PASS - All nav links present (Startseite, Bibliothek, Suche, Hochladen, Playlists, Favoriten)
frontend.playlists_page: PASS - 'Neue Playlist' button present, creation works
